name: Cabbage Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In hot oil, cook leeks, onion, carrot, celery, and garlic.
2. Add broth. Simmer 10-15 minutes.
3. Add green beans, tomatoes, cabbage. Heat until vegetables are tender.
4. Add beans, water, salt, and pepper. Cover and simmer until cooked (no specific time given).
5. Place a slice of bread in individual bowls. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with Parmesan.
6. Ladle soup on top.
